subcodes.first_line: O ye two pure souls! Strive, as much as ye can, in service at the sacred Threshold of the One True God, and when [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو نفس زکیه تا توانید در خدمت آستان احدیت حضرت مقدسه بکوشید و چون
subcodes.subjects: @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @service to others; to the Cause of God
